_comment: Fixture for event-evaluation integration tests — issue #82

market_event.description: ACME Corp files 8-K disclosing material agreement with strategic partner.

standing_prompt.body: ACME Corp thesis: monitor 8-K filings for material agreements and partnerships. Evaluate for strategic impact on revenue and market position. Signal HIGH confidence when a disclosed agreement aligns with thesis. Signal LOW confidence when the agreement scope is unclear or restricted.
